de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint

Class ExceptionBreakpoint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractBreakpoint
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.ExceptionBreakpoint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IBreakpoint

    public class ExceptionBreakpoint
extends AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
    ThisExceptionBreakpoint represents an exception breakpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective breakpoint is hit.
    Author:
    Marco Drebing

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private boolean caught
      a flag whether to watch for an uncaught exception
      private String exceptionName
      The exception to watch for
      private Set<Node> exceptionParentNodes
      a list of nodes of the Symbolic Execution Tree whose children represent exceptions
      private boolean suspendOnSubclasses
      a flag whether to suspend on subclasses of the exception aswell
      private boolean uncaught
      a flag to tell whether to stop at uncaught exceptions or not

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExceptionBreakpoint(Proof proof, String exceptionName, boolean caught, boolean uncaught, boolean suspendOnSubclasses, boolean enabled, int hitCount)
      Creates a new AbstractHitCountBreakpoint.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement, RuleApp ruleApp, Proof proof, Node node)
      Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered.

    • Field Detail

      • exceptionName

        private String exceptionName
        The exception to watch for

      • exceptionParentNodes

        private Set<Node> exceptionParentNodes
        a list of nodes of the Symbolic Execution Tree whose children represent exceptions

      • caught

        private boolean caught
        a flag whether to watch for an uncaught exception

      • suspendOnSubclasses

        private boolean suspendOnSubclasses
        a flag whether to suspend on subclasses of the exception aswell

      • uncaught

        private boolean uncaught
        a flag to tell whether to stop at uncaught exceptions or not

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExceptionBreakpoint

        public ExceptionBreakpoint(Proof proof,
                   String exceptionName,
                   boolean caught,
                   boolean uncaught,
                   boolean suspendOnSubclasses,
                   boolean enabled,
                   int hitCount)
        Creates a new AbstractHitCountBreakpoint.
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof that will be executed and should stop
        exceptionName - the name of the exception to watch for
        caught - flag to tell if caught exceptions lead to a stop
        uncaught - flag to tell if uncaught exceptions lead to a stop
        suspendOnSubclasses - flag to tell if the execution should suspend on subclasses of the exception aswell
        enabled - flag if the Breakpoint is enabled
        hitCount - the number of hits after which the execution should hold at this breakpoint

    • Method Detail

      • isParentNode

        public boolean isParentNode(Node node,
                   Node parent)
        Checks if the given node is a parent of the other given node.
        Parameters:
        node - The Node to start search in.
        node - The Node that is thought to be the parent.
        Returns:
        true if the parent node is one of the nodes parents

      • isBreakpointHit

        public boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement,
                      RuleApp ruleApp,
                      Proof proof,
                      Node node)
        Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered. Override this method in order to suspend execution when a breakpoint is hit.
        Specified by:
        isBreakpointHit in interface IBreakpoint
        Overrides:
        isBreakpointHit in class AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
        Parameters:
        activeStatement - the activeStatement of the node
        ruleApp - the applied RuleApp
        proof - the current proof
        node - the current node
        Returns:
        true if execution should hold

      • isCaught

        public boolean isCaught()
        Returns:
        the isCaught

      • setCaught

        public void setCaught(boolean isCaught)
        Parameters:
        isCaught - the isCaught to set

        public boolean isUncaught()
        Returns:
        the isUncaught

      • setUncaught

        public void setUncaught(boolean isUncaught)
        Parameters:
        isUncaught - the isUncaught to set

      • isSuspendOnSubclasses

        public boolean isSuspendOnSubclasses()
        Returns:
        the suspendOnSubclasses

      • setSuspendOnSubclasses

        public void setSuspendOnSubclasses(boolean suspendOnSubclasses)
        Parameters:
        suspendOnSubclasses - the suspendOnSubclasses to set
